case_title: PENA, MICHAEL BENJAMIN VS NG, EDMUND

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, MICHAEL BENJAMIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NG, EDMUND PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
INVALID SERVICE AS TO DEFEND, CLAIM NOT SERVED TO AN INDIVIDUAL; SLIPPED THRU MAIL SLOT.
